creator: prox@prolixium.com
text:
On Fri, Dec 09, 2011 at 05:41:37PM +0000, jh@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [panic] FreeBSD 7.0 crash after subdiskXX: detached

> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback

> State-Changed-Why: 
> Note that submitter has been asked for feedback.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=129426

I haven't seen this problem since I replaced the original machine with a
completely new one that has an entirely different set of hardware.  I
wouldn't say the issue is resolved, but I'm no longer able to reproduce
it, sorry :(

- Mark
